LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF BAY MARINA MANAGEMENT, INC.'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM JUDGMENT DENYING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. SECTION 473(B) RELIEF IS NOT AVAILABLE TO THE UNSUCCESSFUL MOVING PARTY ON A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. IN ANY EVENT, THERE IS NO QUALIFYING EXCUSABLE NEGLECT AND EVEN IF THERE WERE, THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS DENIED ON BOTH PROCEDURAL AND SUBSTANTIVE GROUNDS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-12-2007 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Koorosh Afshari, Clerks K. Shaw/S. Van Tree, Reporter ****. (218/206)

Appearances:
Sheila Chandor, Harbor Master, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Bay Marina Management, Inc.
Steve H. Herman representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Robert D. Valdes AKA Robert D. Valdez is present.
Paul Behrend, Aaron Morrison and Jessica Alexandria representing the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled and the terms are placed on the record. The key points being;
**Defendant Valdez shall vacate Slip D at the Bay Marina site by 7/16/07.
**Plaintiff shall tender a check in the amount of $8,000.00 to the defendant through his counsel by 7/16/07.
**If the defendant chooses, he may relinquish ownership of his boat to Bay Marina Management without any attaching liens or fees.
**Parties are to prepare a settlement agreement memorializing the terms specified on the record.
**Each side is to bear its own fees and costs.

The trial date is off calendar.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Judgment Denying Motion For Summary Judgment And Motion For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jun-04-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. ELIZABETH M. LINK OF THE LAW OFFICES OF STEVEN HERMAN, TEL. NO. 982-6800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY;
ATTY. PAUL BEHREND, TEL. NO. 956-0549, APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS' TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - PLAINTIFF BAY MARINA MANAGEMENT, INC'S Motion For Relief From Judgment Denying Motion For Summary Judgment And Motion For Summary Adjudication is denied. Section 473(b) relief is not available to the unsuccessful moving party on a Motion for Summary Judgment. In any event, there is no qualifying excusable neglect and even if there were, the Motion for Summary Judgment was denied on both procedural and substantive grounds. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB/CK)
